author: IGN YouTube
text:
Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 - Official Vault Edition Trailer
Take a look at the Vault Edition trailer for Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, the latest entry in the rebooted Modern Warfare series. War erupts on the Korean Peninsula as North Korea launches a full-scale invasion that threatens to destabilize the world. A young squad of South Korean soldiers fight to survive on the collapsing front lines, while half a world away, a vengeful Captain Price wages a personal war from the shadows as he stays one step ahead of those hunting him. As Price’s off-book mission collides with the forces behind the invasion, the war spreads beyond anyone’s control. 
Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 launches on October 23, 2026 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Nintendo Switch 2, PC (BattleNet, Steam, Xbox on PC) and Xbox Series X|S.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Korea. IL-2 Series - Official Early Access Release Date Trailer
Check out the Early Access release date trailer for Korea. IL-2 Series, the newest entry in the acclaimed aerial combat-sim series! Using the backdrop of the Korean War, Korea. IL-2 Series will allow players to take to the skies in historically accurate aircrafts used in the conflict. Korea. IL-2 Series will be available in Early Access on PC on June 25.
